name: frontend-engineering-kit
description: Frontend engineering plugin for frontend architecture patterns, React architecture, component boundaries, domain modeling, design guidance, and TDD workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend structure patterns, React architecture, boundary, domain, design, and test workflow guidance.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex make stronger frontend decisions by guiding Atomic or FSD structure choices, React architecture rules, component boundaries, domain-driven frontend structure, UI implementation quality, and Red-Green-Refactor test workflow.
defaultPrompt: Review this component structure and propose better frontend boundaries.
Decide whether this React codebase should use Atomic Design, FSD, or a hybrid, and explain why.
Model this frontend feature with domain, application, and UI separation.
Drive this UI change with Red-Green-Refactor and the right test level.
